## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New command / feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New commands added to `manifest.ts` and `tests/fixtures/expected-commands.ts` (if applicable)
- [ ] `npm run generate-docs` run (if commands changed)
